name: clickhouse-logs-queries
tagline: Reference guide for writing, reviewing, and migrating ClickHouse-backed Supabase logs queries, including BigQuery-to-ClickHouse translation.
verdict: Solid, low-risk reference skill: no network or shell commands, concrete worked SQL examples, and bulky migration/codebase material split into on-demand reference files. Weak spots are hygiene only: no stated out-of-scope note (could misfire on non-ClickHouse SQL asks) and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion anywhere; nothing scopes it away from general SQL or non-ClickHouse logs tasks.
Description is ~690 chars, over the ~500 char guidance, though content is substantive rather than filler.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the skill.
